response:
# Verdict: REJECT ## Overall Assessment This component has a **critical accessibility design gap**. The loading state is communicated visually only—screen reader users will not be notified when content is being fetched or when it completes. This violates core WAI-ARIA patterns for dynamic content and WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages. Screen reader users may think the app is frozen during the 2-second load window, leading to unnecessary refresh attempts or abandonment. ## Pre-commitment Predictions | Prediction | Actual Finding | |------------|-----------------| | Missing aria-busy on container | ✅ CONFIRMED (CRITICAL) | | No role="status" for loading state | ✅ CONFIRMED (MAJOR) | | No aria-live region for announcements | ✅ CONFIRMED (CRITICAL) | | Loading message not announced to AT | ✅ CONFIRMED (CRITICAL) | ## Critical Findings ### 1. Missing State Communication for Dynamic Content **File:** `src/components/DataLoader.tsx:6-24` **Evidence:** ```jsx {isLoading && (

Loading data...

)} ``` | Attribute | Expected Value | Actual Value | WCAG/APG Citation | |-----------|-----------------|---------------|-------------------| | `aria-busy` on `.data-container` | `"true"` when loading, `"false"` otherwise | Missing entirely | WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value; WAI-ARIA Dynamic Content Pattern | **User Group Impacted:** Screen reader users **Why this matters:** Without `aria-busy="true"`, screen readers announce the container as available for interaction while it's actually processing data. Users may attempt to interact with elements that aren't ready yet. The loading state is purely visual—no programmatic indication of "processing." --- ### 2. No Live Region for Loading Announcements **File:** `src/components/DataLoader.tsx:6-14` **Evidence:** ```jsx {isLoading && (
{/* BUG: No aria-live, no role=status */} ...
)} ``` | Attribute | Expected Value | Actual Value | WCAG/APG Citation | |-----------|-----------------|---------------|-------------------| | `role` on loading container | `"status"` or `"alert"` (polite for non-critical) | Missing | WAI-ARIA Live Region Pattern; WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages | **User Group Impacted:** Screen reader users **Why this matters:** The `

Loading data...

` text will not be announced by screen readers unless it's in a live region (`role="status"` with `aria-live`). Users won't hear "Loading..." when the spinner appears, nor will they know content has loaded. This creates an information gap between visual and AT experience. --- ### 3. No Focus Management on Content Change (if embedded in SPA) **File:** `src/components/DataLoader.tsx:20-24` **Evidence:** ```jsx {!isLoading && data && (
...
)} ``` | Behavior | Expected | Actual | WCAG/APG Citation | |----------|-----------|--------|-------------------| | Focus after load completes | Move to content heading or main area | Undefined/accidental | WCAG 2.4.3 Focus Order; WAI-ARIA Dynamic Content Pattern | **User Group Impacted:** Keyboard-only users, screen reader users **Why this matters:** If `DataLoader` is embedded in a larger app and data loads asynchronously, focus should move to the new content after loading completes (or stay on trigger if user initiated). Without explicit handling, keyboard users may be left at an unrelated element. --- ### 4. Missing aria-live Region for Status Updates **File:** `src/components/DataLoader.tsx:6-24` **Evidence:** ```jsx
{/* No parent live region */}
``` | Attribute | Expected Value | Actual Value | WCAG/APG Citation | |-----------|-----------------|---------------|-------------------| | `aria-live` on container or wrapper | `"polite"` for loading status, `"assertive"` for errors | Missing | WAI-ARIA Live Region Pattern; WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages | **User Group Impacted:** Screen reader users **Why this matters:** The entire component lacks a live region mechanism. Even if `aria-busy` were added, the loading message itself needs to be announced via `role="status"` with appropriate `aria-live`. Without both, screen readers will not announce state changes at all. --- ## Major Findings ### 5. Loading Message Not Associated Programmatically **File:** `src/components/DataLoader.tsx:9-13` **Evidence:** ```jsx

Loading data...

``` | Issue | Expected Behavior | Actual Behavior | WCAG/APG Citation | |-------|-------------------|------------------|-------------------| | Text not in live region | `Loading data...` | Plain paragraph element | WAI-ARIA Live Region Pattern; WCAG 4.1.3 Status Messages | **User Group Impacted:** Screen reader users **
